summary: Post-fb234300 proof search confirms that the next source frontier is the WPP functor-category localization/direct-localization boundary, not another W961 wrapper. The local API can build the WPP functor-category localization from fixed-target or normalized fixed-target inputs, but current source still does not synthesize those inputs, direct left calculus, source bounded-complex triangulation, W732 route data, or the original four-task positive witness.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.
OriginalFourTaskProductData still requires caller-supplied bounded-derived stable data, W852 route data, or W961 closed-embedding closedness field data; no nullary product witness exists.
A nullary Dbounded.MetrizableStableInstanceBoundaryDirectLocalizationInputs value is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete MetrizableWppBoundaryRelationTargetClosednessNormalizedDataProviderW732 value is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete ClosedEmbeddingClosednessFieldsInputW961 value is still not constructible from current source; the post-W961 probe prints 18 explicit fields.
Typeclass synthesis does not provide Pretriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA) or IsTriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA).

The checked WPP functor-category localization constructors require Dbounded.MetrizableWalkingParallelPairFunctorCategoryRemainingFixedTargetInputs or Dbounded.MetrizableWalkingParallelPairNormalizedFixedTargetInputs.

Mathlib's available CategoryTheory.Functor.IsLocalization.pi theorem covers finite product/discrete-diagram localization, not the non-discrete WalkingParallelPair functor-category localization needed here.
Existing direct-left-calculus declarations remain parameterized by route data.
The direct-localization boundary still needs WPP transfer inputs and a source-side direct-localization triangulated core.
The smallest current transfer-input route still needs rightOpenLca, rightSurjectiveLca, opExactAcyclicClosure, and functorCategoryLocalization fields.
remaining_work: Construct a concrete nullary W732 route-data provider or a nullary direct-localization boundary input.
Use that source data to build a nullary bounded-derived stable package.
Assemble and audit the final original four-task positive witness.
Build the Tier C review packet and only then permit update_goal complete.
verified_commands: jq -r '.packages[] | select(.name=="mathlib" or .name=="aesop" or .name=="Qq" or .name=="batteries" or .name=="Cli") | [.name,.inputRev,.rev] | @tsv' lake-manifest.json
lake env lean <#check direct-boundary and W657 field probe>
lake env lean <#synth WPP functor-category localization probe>
lake env lean <inferInstance W657 direct-localization probe>
